name: Taco Macaroni Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. Rinse with cold water; drain.
3. Chill at least 1 hour.
4. Cook ground round in a large skillet until browned, stirring to crumble; drain off drippings.
5. Stir in taco seasoning and French dressing; cool.
6. Combine macaroni, beef mixture, and remaining ingredients in a large bowl; toss well.
7. Serve salad immediately.
